metadata.title: SLSA — Supply-chain Levels for Software Artifacts (Build Track) → AppSec Core V1 (with ACR-001, ACR-002, ACR-004 incorporated) (Concept Crosswalk)
metadata.schema-basis: NIST IR 8477 relationship vocabulary + NIST IR 8278A r1 STRM resource model

source-document.title: SLSA — Supply-chain Levels for Software Artifacts (Build Track)
source-document.author: OpenSSF / SLSA Working Group

reference-document.title: AppSec Core V1 (with ACR-001, ACR-002, ACR-004 incorporated)
reference-document.author: SbD-ToE Programme — AppSec Core ontology project

metadata.methodology: Threshold-based continuous→categorical translation: sim≥0.6 → equal; 0.4≤sim<0.6 → intersects-with; sim<0.4 → unspecified. Multi-claim per source-item: one row per (source-item, target-Core-entity) unique pair using highest-similarity claim for that target. is-primary="true" marks item overall highest-similarity claim's target. subset-of / superset-of NOT in first cut (cosine similarity lacks directional info; SME refinement future work). STRM resource model: pilot doc → DocumentaryImpl; source-item → ConcreteImpl; AppSec Core V1 → Reference Document; Core entity → Concept.

source-element.description: Build L1: Provenance exists. Summary Package has provenance showing how it was built. Can be used to prevent mistakes but is trivial to bypass or forge. Intended for Projects and organizations wantin…

reference-element.description: Provenance And Signature Verification At Promotion. Promote only artifacts whose identity, signature or provenance has been verified at release time. The repo has strong artifact support for provenan…

mapping.rationale: Cosine similarity 0.593; threshold mapping → intersects-with. Claim SLSA_SPEC_V1_0_BUILD_TRACK-CLAIM-000001 at Mechanism level. Primary anchor (item highest-similarity claim).

source-element.description: Build L1: Provenance exists. Summary Package has provenance showing how it was built. Can be used to prevent mistakes but is trivial to bypass or forge. Intended for Projects and organizations wantin…

reference-element.description: Artifact Signature And Provenance Validation. Attach and verify signature, attestation and provenance evidence for produced artifacts and images. integrity traceability and records. attestation

mapping.rationale: Cosine similarity 0.570; threshold mapping → intersects-with. Claim SLSA_SPEC_V1_0_BUILD_TRACK-CLAIM-000002 at Practice level. Secondary disclosure.

reference-element.description: Verified Artifact Promotion. Promote only artifacts whose identity, signature or provenance has been verified at release time. integrity traceability and records. provenance verification
